Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}H-Hey, sorry for calling you out here...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}I... actually have a little favor to ask.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}It's just that... I promised to meet up with her, but I'm still kind of scared.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}If I see her... I might end up saying some really nasty things...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}What if we end up hurting each other even more? I'm not trying to make her feel bad...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}I haven't fully sorted out my feelings yet.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}But I do want to see her... I think.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}That's why I thought it'd be great if you could be there with me, {f 4 1}-kun.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}It's just that I'd feel more confident having you around.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}With you by my side, I think I could treat my mom with a little more kindness.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}So, if it's not too much trouble... What do you think?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 11 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Okay, I'll call her up right away! I've been putting this off for so long...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}Sorry to wrap you up in my family situation.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}I mean, meeting anyone's parents is already awkward... Mine would be ten times worse![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}In any case, um... it won't be right away. Besides, I still haven't gathered the confidence myself...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}I'll just ask her when she's free. And if you don't have plans that day... Well, think about it, okay?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}It really would make me happy if you came along.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}You don't think I'm relying on you too much, do you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}Whoa, you are brutally honest![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}In that case, it's only fair for me to help you out when you need it too, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}But still, this isn't a one-way street! Let me know whenever you need help too, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}You know, it's almost spring break.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}It all went by so fast... We're gonna be third-years soon.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}And after that, we'll graduate and go to college... then become working adults, I guess?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Do you think... we'll still be together at that point?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I get what you mean, though. It's hard to say what things will be like so far into the future.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}Well, let's talk about the near future, then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}I told you to think about where you wanna go, remember?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}I still think the best place to start is Destinyland.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 50 0 0}It's just a day trip, so that makes planning easy. And it's perfect for bigger groups, too![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 11 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 51 0 0}Oh! But if we decide on the mountains, we should stay the night. If we're gonna travel far, might as well make the most of it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 11 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 52 0 0}Hehe, I'm getting excited just thinking about it![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 53 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}With you, {f 4 1}-kun, it'll be fun no matter where we go.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 54 0 0}Oh, crap! I totally forgot to turn in today's assignment. I'd better go do that now![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 11 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 56 0 0}Don't forget to save some time during spring break, okay?[n]{f 1 1}
